events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: wrong wirenut size staged for terminations & splices. This is non-compliant per NEC 110.14 (electrical connections must be suitable for the conductor material, size, etc.). Wrong wirenut size could lead to poor connection, overheating, arcing. Decision: fail. Risk: high. Work stage: staged. Percent complete: 0. Component conditions: installed-defective (the existing wrong wirenut is installed-defective), non-compliant.

  "actions": [
    "Select a wirenut rated by the manufacturer for the specific conductor count, material (Cu/Al), and AWG size involved.",
    "Verify torque and installation method per the connector listing before energizing."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 110.14 requires terminations and splices to be made with identified connectors suitable for the conductor material, size, and number of conductors. A wrong-size wirenut does not meet that requirement and is a defect before work begins.",
